pi_items.source: Analysis of setup_task.sh which generates the data from a python list of 20 items
Task definitions and standard Menu Engineering methodology (Kasavana & Smith, 1982)

privileged_info_summary: The data is synthetic and hardcoded in setup_task.sh (20 restaurant items). The ground truth values for the averages are Avg_Qty = 268.5 and Avg_CM = 10.4375. Based on these averages, the 20 items are correctly categorized into: 2 Stars, 7 Plowhorses, 6 Puzzles, and 5 Dogs.
